## Meeting Purpose

[Interview between Andi Bailey (Head of Customer Operations at GrowthX) and Hassan Rashid for the Technical Managing Editor role.](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX seeks a Technical Managing Editor to manage 3-5 clients, lead content production, and provide feedback on AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [Hassan demonstrated strong technical skills by building a content analysis tool specifically for the role](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
  - [The position balances project management, client communication, and cross-functional collaboration with engineering](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [GrowthX is rapidly evolving its product and processes, requiring adaptability from the Managing Editor role](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)

## Topics

### Role Overview and Responsibilities

  - [Managing Editor manages 3-5 clients within a pod structure](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Key responsibilities:](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
      - [Project management of client deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
      - [Client communications](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
      - [Editing AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
      - [Providing feedback to refine AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Works with content managers, account strategists/directors](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [Focus on executing 2-3 month strategies, then reevaluating](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)

### Hassan's Background and Skills

  - [2 years as Product Manager at Adapar (fintech platform)](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
      - [Shipped 40 features, drove 344% feature user growth](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
      - [Created client-facing docs, release notes, help articles](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Recently exploring AI for systematizing content processes](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [Built custom content analysis tool for GrowthX application](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
      - [Compares original vs. updated content](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
      - [Flags major changes, missing elements, brief compliance](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
      - [Generates action items for further refinement](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)

### GrowthX's Approach and Technology

  - [Uses proprietary platform for content production (not Jarvis/AeroFS)](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [AI workflows customized for each client](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [Produces 5-10 content pieces per client weekly](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [Platform is only 2.5 months old, rapidly evolving](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
  - [Shifting focus to funnel metrics and clear lead development](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=2021.0)
  - [Building internal analytics dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=2062.0)

### Client Management and Success Metrics

  - [Ideal clients have established content (easier to demonstrate wins)](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=1931.0)
  - [Success typically seen in \~3 months for established clients](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=1917.0)
  - [Managing Editors measured on client retention, not specific KPIs](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=2073.0)
  - [Challenges include post-AI editing to ensure quality](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=2161.0)

### Team Structure and Reporting

  - [Reporting structure fluid due to rapid growth](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
  - [Managing Editors have dotted-line reporting to Account Strategists](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)
  - [New SEO Specialist role to support data analysis and experiments](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=2119.0)

## Next Steps

  - Hassan to await feedback on his interview performance
  - [GrowthX to consider Hassan's custom tool as potential asset](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
  - [Andi to review Hassan's editorial experience in more detail](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Hassan to prepare for potential follow-up regarding technical skills and content editing abilities](https://fathom.video/share/Acz9-oaCjz_X3WNDizi8-p_RoZFUFnqe?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
